---
title: "Matthew Glasenapp"
subtitle: "Bioinformatics Scientist"
image: headshot.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 12em
  links:
  - text: Email
    icon: envelope
    href: mailto:mglasena@ucsc.edu
  - text: LinkedIn
    icon: linkedin
    href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/matthew-glasenapp/
  - text: GitHub
    icon: github
    href: https://github.com/matthewglasenapp
---

## About

I am a bioinformatics scientist with research interests in evolutionary genomics, phylogenomics, and computational biology. My work spans population genetics of marine invertebrates to developing tools for HLA typing and analysis.

## Interests

- Evolutionary & Population Genomics
- Phylogenomics
- Bioinformatics Tool Development
- HLA Typing & Analysis

## Education

- **PhD** | University of California, Santa Cruz
- **MA** | University of California, Santa Cruz
- **BA** | Macalester College
